title: thelymitra cornicina
intro: Thelymitra cornicina, also known as the Greenhood orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia. It is known for its unique green hooded labellum and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Thelymitra cornicina include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
